zh.lifeSummary: 當María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña於1166年出生在葡萄牙艾維洛利貝拉時，她的父親Paio Moniz de Ribeira27歲，母親Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança23歲。她和Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1258年在葡萄牙波爾圖比拉 諾瓦 德 蓋亞格利越享年93歲，埋葬在葡萄牙布拉加阿馬雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña于1166年出生在葡萄牙艾維洛利貝拉时，她的父亲Paio Moniz de Ribeira27岁，母亲Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança23岁。她和Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1258年在葡萄牙波爾圖比拉 諾瓦 德 蓋亞格利越享年93岁，埋葬在葡萄牙布拉加阿馬雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Páez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jorge, Carlos, Jesus, Pedro, Rafael, Manuel, Miguel, Raul, Ricardo.
Spanish (Páez): Castilianized form of Portuguese and Galician Pais .

variants.name: Pais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Jose, Alberto, Ana, Ramon, Adelino, Alina, Altino, Angel, Armando, Armindo, Catalina.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Sebastiao, Serafim.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Silvio, Antonino, Ateo, Elio, Guido, Lia.

Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name Paio, an equivalent of Spanish Pelayo . This surname is also found in western India (Maharashtra, Karnataka, and Goa), where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.
Italian (southern): probably of Spanish origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ribeira
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Fernando, Jorge, Americo, Mario, Armindo, Augusto, Julio, Luiz, Renato.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Albano, Vasco, Afonso, Agostinho, Almir, Amadeu, Guilherme, Henrique, Lidio.

Portuguese and Galician: from ribeiro ‘stream’, either a topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or a habitational name from any of several places called with this word. Compare Rebeiro and Rivero .

variants.name: Rebeiro
meanings: Altered form of Portuguese and Galician   Ribeiro  .

variants.name: Rivero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jorge, Juan, Roberto, Carlos, Luis, Raul, Pedro, Ramon, Ricardo, Armando.
Spanish: habitational name from any of the places in Cantabria and Cáceres named Rivero, from ribero ‘bank, shore’ (from Late Latin riparium, a derivative of ripa ‘bank’).

nameMeanings.name: María
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Maria
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña was born in 1166, in Ribeira, Aveiro, Portugal, her father, Paio Moniz de Ribeira, was 27 and her mother, Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança, was 23. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. She died about 1258, in Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portugal, at the age of 93, and was buried in Amares, Braga, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña est née en 1166, à Ribeira, Aveiro, Portugal, son père, Paio Moniz de Ribeira, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Elle est décédée environ 1258, à Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portugal, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterrée à Amares, Braga, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña 1166 in Ribeira, Aveiro, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Paio Moniz de Ribeira 27 und ihre Mutter Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança 23. Sie hatte mit Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1258 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portugal und wurde in Amares, Braga, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña è nata il nel 1166 nel Ribeira, Aveiro, Portogallo, sua padre, Paio Moniz de Ribeira, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Morì circa 1258, nel Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portogallo, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolta a Amares, Braga, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriñaが1166年にポルトガルエイベイロリベイラで生まれた時，父Paio Moniz de Ribeiraは27歳，母Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragançaは23歳であった。彼女はSancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugalとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1258年にポルトガルポルトーヴィラ ノヴァ ド ガイアグリジoで93歳で死去し，ポルトガルブラガアマレスにて埋葬された。

ko.Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Vall: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 몽올그르 데 캄푸스 몽올그르

ko.lifeSummary: María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña(이)가 1166년 포르투갈 에브이로 리브이라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Paio Moniz de Ribeira(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1258년 포르투갈 포토 빌라 노바 데 게이아 그리제이o에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 브라가 아마스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña nasceu em 1166, em Ribeira, Aveiro, Portugal, seu pai, Paio Moniz de Ribeira, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1258, em Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portugal, com 93 anos, e foi sepultada em Amares, Braga, Portugal.

ru.Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portuga: гриджo, вила нова де геиа, порто, Португалия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña родилась в 1166 г. в местности рибира, авиро, Португалия, её отцу по имени Paio Moniz de Ribeira было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Она умерла около 1258 г. в местности гриджo, вила нова де геиа, порто, Португалия в возрасте 93 лет и была похоронена в местности амаресь, брага, Португалия.

es.Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portuga: Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Oporto, Portugal
es.lifeSummary: Cuando María Páez de Ribeira La Ribeiriña nació en 1166, en Ribeira, Aveiro, Portugal, su papá, Paio Moniz de Ribeira, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Doña Urraca Núñez de Bragança, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal. Murió aproximadamente 1258, en Grijó, Vila Nova de Gaia, Oporto, Portugal, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultada en Amares, Braga, Portugal.
